description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two compact rectangular speakers with rounded edges, connected by a single cable. The front face of each speaker features a large circular driver surrounded by a silver ring, with a vertical grille above the driver for additional sound output or ventilation. The main body is finished in matte black on the front and top, while the sides and back are a light gray color. The speakers rest on small feet for stability and have visible product labels on the rear. A USB connector is attached to the cable, indicating power or audio input compatibility.
description: A pair of compact, rectangular stereo speakers with black fronts, silver-ringed drivers, and gray sides, connected by a USB cable.
description_view_0: Front view showing both speaker drivers, silver rings, vertical grilles, and the connecting cable with USB plug.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the light gray body, black front face, and the speaker's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying product labels, cable routing, and the back panel of both speakers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slim, light gray profile as the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue circular logo with the text 'Skyline' is visible on the lower front of each speaker.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Vertical slotted grille above the main driver, with evenly spaced horizontal slots; the main driver is covered by a smooth, circular surface with a silver ring.
